codeReview.summary: Current HEAD still satisfies the feature contract. The listener-bound port-3000 app test asserts the degraded stale-live runtime truth (`source_class: stale_live`) after the listener-bound transition, while the default pre-listener path remains bootstrap-shaped. The feature commit itself is empty because the needed test alignment had already landed earlier on branch in commit 25e1a1b.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the regression-gate skill procedure, but the feature handoff records success even though the cited broader gate command still failed from an unrelated flaky integration-live-data timeout. That outcome was justified here because the assigned app-test contract was already green, yet the skill does not explicitly describe how to handle no-op verification features whose exact gate remains red for unrelated reasons.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff 2026-04-02T21-53-58-271Z reports `TMPDIR=/home/whoami/dev/opengecko/openGecko/data bun run test -- --maxWorkers=2` exited 1 due to `tests/integration-live-data.test.ts`, while feature expectations in features.json only required the listener-bound `tests/app.test.ts` contract to match current runtime truth.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit history, and current HEAD implementation. The feature contract holds on current HEAD, with no blocking or non-blocking code issues found for the listener-bound port-3000 source-class alignment path.
